app_description: Product margin calculator — pulls wholesale costs from Netsuite and retail prices from Magento to show real-time margin by category. Already built a working prototype locally.
business_value_description: Merchandising team spends 4 hours/week manually pulling margin reports. This would be instant. Already validated with working prototype.

app_description: Member lookup dashboard — search by email or member ID to see subscription status; order history; and active issues from Zendesk. Replaces toggling between 3 tabs.
business_value_description: Support agents currently toggle between Zendesk; Snowflake dashboard; and admin panel. Average handle time could drop 30% with unified view.

app_description: Campaign performance tracker — pulls email open/click rates from Klaviyo and maps to conversion events in Snowflake. Visual dashboard with week-over-week trends.
business_value_description: Marketing has no real-time view of campaign-to-conversion pipeline. Currently waiting 3 days for analyst-built reports.

app_description: Warehouse capacity planner — reads current inventory levels from Snowflake and DC capacity from a shared Google Sheet to flag potential stockouts 2 weeks ahead.
business_value_description: Operations caught a major stockout last month only 2 days before it hit. This tool would have flagged it 14 days earlier.

app_description: Vendor payment reconciliation tool — matches invoices from Netsuite against purchase orders and flags discrepancies over $500. Generates exception report.
business_value_description: Finance team manually reconciles ~200 invoices/month. 8 hours of work that could be automated. Discrepancies over $500 are caught weeks late.

app_description: Interview scheduler — reads open roles from Greenhouse API and available interviewer slots from Google Calendar to suggest optimal interview panels.
business_value_description: Scheduling coordinator spends 6 hours/week playing calendar Tetris. PII involved: candidate names; emails; interview notes.

app_description: Vendor scorecard generator — aggregates on-time delivery rates; quality returns; and margin data from Netsuite and Snowflake into a monthly vendor report card.
business_value_description: Vendor reviews happen quarterly with stale data. Monthly automated scorecards would improve negotiation leverage and catch quality issues faster.

app_description: Refund approval dashboard — shows pending refund requests over $50 with member history and fraud signals. Approve/deny with one click.
business_value_description: Refund approvals over $50 require manager review. Currently done via Slack threads and spreadsheets. $200K/month in refunds needs better governance.

app_description: Social proof widget — displays real-time member count and recent positive reviews on the marketing site. Pulls from Snowflake and Trustpilot API.
business_value_description: Marketing wants to A/B test social proof on landing pages. Simple read-only widget but it would be public-facing.

app_description: Shipping cost analyzer — compares actual vs estimated shipping costs by carrier from Snowflake. Flags orders where actual cost exceeded estimate by >20%.
business_value_description: Shipping cost overruns are $30K/month. Nobody has visibility into which carriers or routes are causing overruns until end-of-month reconciliation.

app_description: Model monitoring dashboard — displays ML model performance metrics (accuracy; drift; latency) from internal model registry and New Relic. Alerts on degradation.
data_sources_needed: Internal model registry API;New Relic API
business_value_description: Data science team manually checks model performance weekly. Two production model degradations were caught late last quarter; costing ~$50K in bad recommendations.

app_description: Contract clause extractor — upload vendor contracts (PDFs) and extract key terms (payment terms; liability caps; auto-renewal dates) into a structured table.
business_value_description: Legal reviews ~40 vendor contracts/quarter. Extracting key terms takes 2 hours per contract. PII in contracts: signer names; addresses; sometimes SSNs for sole proprietors.
